title: SPLASH PADS - 211info
text: FREEWATER PARK SPLASH PAD SPLASH PADS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Available to the public as a way to cool off when temperatures are dangerously warm. Offers a water splash pad, open air shade, and park spaces. 17 NE 8th Avenue Milton Freewater, OR 97862 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 8am-10pm Get Directions Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Umatilla County Services: Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
